name: rootloom
description: Codex engineering controls woven from attributable evidence to verified process.

interface.shortDescription: Reliable Codex engineering, woven from the roots up.
interface.longDescription: Rootloom weaves tiered task intake, repository guidance, attributable evidence, durable decision records, root-cause workflows, command Rules, model-routed agents, lifecycle audits, and deterministic process gates into five selectable capability layers. Teams can start with Skills only, choose the single-agent engineering default, or explicitly opt into controlled delegation and high assurance.
defaultPrompt: Classify and execute a task with the right Rootloom workflow tier.
Seed and refine AGENTS.md guidance for this repository.
Run a controlled high-assurance coding change.
